headline_summary: Strait of Hormuz disruption persists, with tanker incidents and large-scale anchoring reducing effective oil/LNG throughput.
Energy prices and shipping/insurance costs are surging as the U.S.-Iran conflict expands and Gulf export logistics remain constrained.
Saudi Arabia explores rerouting crude exports toward the Red Sea (Yanbu) to bypass Hormuz, but faces operational and shipping constraints.
Israel-Hezbollah escalation in Lebanon adds a second conflict front with evacuation orders and strikes reported.
Sanctions pressure on Iran-linked oil logistics tightens as the U.S. expands Iran-related designations targeting networks and vessels.
Cyber activity has increased alongside kinetic escalation, with reported attacks on Iranian apps/websites and heightened alerts in U.S. banking.
risk_drivers: Sustained shipping disruption risk at the Strait of Hormuz (critical oil/LNG chokepoint)
Kinetic incidents impacting commercial vessels and Gulf infrastructure (projectiles/drones/missiles)
Broader regional escalation (Israel-Hezbollah hostilities in Lebanon)
Energy export/logistics constraints (rerouting limits; outages/attacks) and surging freight/insurance premia
Sanctions tightening on Iran-linked shipping and petroleum networks
Elevated cyber risk affecting critical infrastructure and financial sector

Energy: Higher upside risk to Brent/WTI and European/Asian LNG due to Hormuz disruption, tanker/LNG bottlenecks, and higher war-risk premia (oil_up_risk).
Wider Middle East crude differentials and elevated freight/insurance premia; rerouting constraints may keep delivered costs high.
If disruptions persist, inventory draws and refinery feedstock tightness could lift cracks and regional product prices.
FX: Risk-off supports USD/CHF/JPY; EM FX pressure rises for energy importers and high current-account deficit countries (em_fx_pressure).
GCC pegs likely hold, but forward points/liquidity could reflect heightened regional risk if conflict persists.
Rates: Safe-haven demand can support core bonds, but persistent energy-driven inflation risks may reprice breakevens and delay easing expectations (rates_credit_spreads).
Credit spreads can widen for shipping, airlines, and energy-intensive sectors as insurance and financing conditions tighten.
Equities: Risk-off pressure on global equities; relative outperformance bias toward upstream energy/defense; underperformance in transport/logistics and consumer cyclicals.
Volatility elevated; headlines around shipping and energy infrastructure attacks can drive sharp sector rotations (risk_off_flows).

sources.title: Tanker heads to UAE port via Strait of Hormuz to load oil, sources say
Three tankers damaged in Gulf and one seafarer killed as US-Iran conflict escalates
Global oil and gas prices soar as Iran crisis disrupts shipping, production
Saudi Arabia tries to divert oil to Red Sea amid Iran war, faces reluctant shippers
US expands sanctions on Iran over oil sales, weapons programs
Israel orders Lebanese to leave swathe of the south 'immediately'
Hackers hit Iranian apps, websites after US-Israeli strikes
US banks on high alert for cyberattacks as Iran war escalates

events.title: Turkey says NATO air defences destroyed a ballistic missile fired from Iran headed into Turkish airspace; debris reported in Hatay area
events.implication: Potential widening to a NATO member raises escalation tail-risk and supports risk_off_flows and em_fx_pressure.

events.title: Rare tanker transit to load Murban crude via Strait of Hormuz amid shipping disruption (Pola to Jebel Dhanna)
events.implication: Suggests partial/episodic navigation but under elevated operational risk; volatility in flows persists.

events.title: Israel orders evacuation of a swathe of southern Lebanon including Tyre; Israeli strike hits building in Baalbek
events.implication: Lebanon theatre escalation broadens regional conflict footprint; increases risk-off flows and local operational disruption.

events.title: Israel orders evacuation of swathe of southern Lebanon as hostilities with Hezbollah intensify; strike in Baalbek reported
events.implication: Escalation in Lebanon increases regional conflict premium and adds to risk-off dynamics.

events.title: IRGC claims control of Strait of Hormuz; U.S. discusses potential naval escorts for tankers (as reported)
events.implication: Heightened risk of incidents/miscalculation around escort operations; supports oil_up_risk and risk_off_flows.

events.title: U.S. banks on heightened alert for Iran-linked cyberattacks as war escalates
events.implication: Increased cyber-defense posture may coincide with elevated market plumbing risk and risk-off sentiment.

events.title: Iranian missiles hit central Israel (Tel Aviv district impacts reported)
events.implication: Direct Iran-Israel kinetic exchange increases escalation risk and broadens risk-off impulse.

events.title: Saudi Aramco attempts to reroute crude exports to Yanbu to bypass Hormuz; pipeline/Red Sea constraints highlighted
events.implication: Rerouting alleviates some supply risk but raises freight costs and shifts risk to Red Sea routes.

events.title: Energy prices surge as Hormuz disruption persists; Iraq output cuts and attacks on energy/logistics sites reported
events.implication: Energy and shipping shock raises inflation risks and supports risk_off_flows; spillovers to gas and freight.

events.title: US embassy complex in Riyadh hit by drones, Saudi defence ministry says
events.implication: Attack on diplomatic facilities escalates political risk and can trigger further security measures and retaliation.

events.title: US orders some diplomatic staff to leave Bahrain, Iraq and Jordan as Iran conflict escalates
events.implication: Drawdown signals elevated threat environment; can disrupt consular operations and business travel across key hubs.

events.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed and threatens ships attempting to transit
events.implication: Even partial closure can disrupt ~20% of global oil flows and LNG shipments, sharply lifting freight, insurance and oil risk premia.

events.title: Fuel tanker Athe Nova reported hit by drones and burning in Strait of Hormuz
events.implication: Attack on a tanker reinforces physical risk to maritime flows; increases chance of shipping stand-down and insurance withdrawal.

events.title: Saudi Aramco shuts Ras Tanura refinery after drone strike, sources say
events.implication: Temporary shutdown at a key refining/export hub adds upside risk to refined products and crude differentials; raises regional infrastructure vulnerability.

events.title: Marine insurers cancel war-risk cover as Iran conflict intensifies
events.implication: Withdrawal/pricing of war-risk cover can reduce voyage availability and push tanker/container rates higher, feeding inflation and delivered energy costs.

events.title: Global oil and gas shipping costs surge to records amid Hormuz risk
events.implication: Record freight and insurance costs tighten effective supply and lift price volatility across crude, LNG and refined products.

events.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says
events.implication: Container delays amplify supply-chain disruptions beyond energy, pressuring goods inflation and corporate margins.

events.title: AWS reports outages after UAE data center struck by objects
events.implication: Data-center disruption can ripple into payments, trading, and logistics, adding to risk-off sentiment.

events.title: Kuwait intercepts hostile drones on third day of Iran retaliatory strikes
events.implication: Sustained drone threat keeps regional air defenses on high alert; raises risk to energy and base-adjacent assets.

events.title: Hackers hit Iranian apps and websites alongside U.S.-Israeli strikes; internet connectivity drops reported
events.implication: Cyber activity increases operational uncertainty and raises risk of retaliatory cyber actions against Western and regional targets.

events.title: Commercial shipping disrupted as Iran says navigation through Strait of Hormuz halted; multiple tanker incidents reported
events.implication: Higher freight/insurance costs and severe energy supply-chain disruption risk; supports oil_up_risk.

events.title: Maersk pauses Trans-Suez sailings and major lines reroute around Cape; Hormuz crossings suspended
events.location_name: Suez Canal / Bab el-Mandeb / Strait of Hormuz
events.implication: Reroutes extend voyage times, tighten vessel availability, and raise shipping costs; compounds energy market stress via logistics constraints.

events.title: Hackers hit Iranian apps and websites after US-Israeli strikes
events.implication: Cyber spillover increases operational risk for financial and logistics systems; can worsen uncertainty and raise defensive spending.

events.title: US and Israel launch pre-emptive strikes on Iran
events.implication: Marks escalation to direct interstate conflict; raises probability of retaliation against regional bases, shipping and energy infrastructure.

events.title: Iran fires missiles at Gulf cities after US-Israeli strikes
events.implication: Direct attacks on Gulf states increase regional spillover risk and elevate concerns about energy and logistics continuity.

events.title: US expands Iran-related sanctions targeting shadow fleet and supply networks
events.implication: Tightens enforcement risk around Iranian petroleum logistics and procurement; can redirect flows and increase compliance costs for shippers/traders.

events.title: U.S. expands Iran-related sanctions targeting shadow fleet vessels and networks enabling illicit petroleum sales and weapons programs
events.implication: Sanctions tightening can constrain marginal Iranian oil/logistics capacity and elevate compliance/insurance risk.
